name: Kotak 811 #DreamDifferent Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Lifetime free — no annual or renewal fee

categoryRates.description: 1% cashback on all spends with no category restriction

additionalBenefits: Lifetime free card with zero joining and annual fees
Available against fixed deposit — no income proof required
Instant digital card issuance via Kotak 811 app
EMI conversion facility on transactions above ₹2,500
pros: Lifetime free with absolutely no joining or annual fee
Available against fixed deposit making it accessible to anyone with a savings account
Flat 1% cashback on all spends without category restrictions
Good starter card to build credit history
Instant issuance through the Kotak 811 app
cons: Only 1% cashback rate which is below average for dedicated cashback cards
No lounge access of any kind
No welcome benefits or milestone rewards
3.5% foreign currency markup makes it unsuitable for international use
idealFor: First-time credit card users looking to build a credit history with no annual fee
Those who want a secured credit card against a fixed deposit without income proof
Users seeking a simple, no-frills card with straightforward cashback

faqs.question: Do I need a minimum income to get the Kotak 811 credit card?
faqs.answer: No, the Kotak 811 credit card can be issued against a fixed deposit in your Kotak 811 savings account. There is no minimum income requirement.

faqs.question: Is the Kotak 811 card truly lifetime free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the card has zero joining fee, zero annual fee, and zero renewal fee. There are no hidden charges or spend-based conditions for fee waiver.

faqs.question: What is the credit limit on the Kotak 811 card?
faqs.answer: When issued against a fixed deposit, the credit limit is typically 80-90% of the FD amount. For other issuances, the limit is determined based on your credit profile.

faqs.question: Is there a cap on the 1% cashback?
faqs.answer: There is no specified monthly or annual cap on the 1% cashback for general spends, making it a straightforward earning structure.
